common.termsOfServiceContent:
This is an example of terms of service while we wait for the actual legal text.
1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing or using Invincible Voice, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our service.
2. Use of the Service
You agree to use Invincible Voice only for lawful purposes. You may not use the service to distribute harmful content, violate any laws, or infringe on the rights of others.
3. Account Responsibility
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account.
4. Intellectual Property
All content, logos, and software associated with Invincible Voice are the property of Invincible Voice Inc. You may not copy, modify, or distribute our content without written permission.
5. User Content
By submitting content to our platform, you grant Invincible Voice a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute that content in connection with our service.
6. Termination
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at our discretion if you violate these terms or engage in conduct we deem harmful to the service or other users.
7. Disclaimer of Warranties
Invincible Voice is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses.
8. Limitation of Liability
To the fullest extent permitted by law, Invincible Voice Inc. shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
9. Privacy
Your use of the service is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference.
10. Changes to Terms
We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.
11. Governing Law
These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

settings.audioWillBeReady: Audio will be ready when complete.
settings.yourNamePlaceholder: The name you want to communicate with
settings.noFriendsAdded: No friends added yet. Add them in settings.
settings.deleteVoiceMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this custom voice? This action is irreversible.
settings.voiceUploadError: Please provide an audio file and a name for the voice
settings.voiceUploadInvalidFile: Please provide a valid audio file (MP3, WAV)
settings.testVoiceMessage: Hello, your voice will sound like this. You can also clone your own voice by providing an audio recording of yourself.
settings.moreSettingsAvailable: More settings are available on the desktop or tablet version of Invincible Voice

conversation.startSpeaking: Start speaking and your voice will be transcribed. InvincibleVoice will suggest responses to help communicate.
conversation.contextQuestion: Can you provide your first name to help the software understand the context? Thank you!
conversation.repeatQuestion: Can you repeat? The software didn't understand very well.
conversation.deleteConversationMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? This action cannot be undone.
conversation.startFirstConversation: Start your first conversation to see it here
conversation.freezeResponses: Freeze the responses so you can select multiple ones
